p.em: Scenario: 5-Node Cluster (Majority=3). Term 2 ends in split; Term 3 resolves via timing offset.

g.text: © 2024 Dist-Systems Technical Design Art - Raft Specification v1.3

ul.li: Term Symmetry: Term 2 created a tie $(2=2)$.
Reschedule: Randomized timers reset on failure.
Preemption: Node A (200ms) wakes first in Term 3.
Inversion: Followers reset VotedFor on new Term.
Convergence: Node A reaches majority before B times out.
